playbook.intent: Solo dev with shipped MVP grinds to ramen-profitable ($4K MRR / quit-day-job threshold) without VC.
playbook.scope: Solo dev with shipped MVP grinds to ramen-profitable ($4K MRR / quit-day-job threshold) without VC. Combines distribution flywheels, retention defense, and runway accounting until either MRR target hit or honest sunset.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Baseline + runway
stage.intent: Lock in the financial floor and time budget.

tasks.task: Compute personal runway months
Compute current MRR + burn
Set the quit-day-job MRR threshold with a written trigger contract

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with >=6 months runway. Less than 6 - find part-time income first.

stage.name: Single channel bet
stage.intent: Pick ONE acquisition channel and bet hard on it.

tasks.task: Audit which channel converted past customers
Score 3 candidate channels by founder-fit + customer-density
Commit to one channel for the next 90 days

stage.decision-gate: Advance with one named channel and a weekly target. No let us also try X.

stage.name: Activation lift
stage.intent: Move the activation rate before pouring traffic on a leaky funnel.

tasks.task: Map the current activation steps
Identify the single biggest drop-off
Ship one onboarding/email intervention

stage.decision-gate: Advance when activation rate lifts >=20% relative.

stage.name: Retention defense

tasks.task: Measure 30/60/90 retention cohorts
Identify top churn reasons via exit survey
Ship one churn-save email or feature

stage.decision-gate: Advance when monthly churn drops below the channel growth rate.

stage.name: Pricing experiment
stage.intent: Test if you are leaving money on the table.

tasks.task: Pull pricing competitor research
Design a price-tier experiment for new signups
Run for one billing cycle

outputs.output: New tier table OR rollback note

stage.decision-gate: Advance when conversion + ARPU combine to lift MRR per signup >=15%.

stage.name: Compounding content/growth loop
stage.intent: Stack a compounding asset on top of the single channel.

tasks.task: Pick one compounding asset (SEO content, newsletter, referral, community)
Ship the loop in a measurable form
Wire metrics so impact is attributable

stage.decision-gate: Advance if the loop produces measurable lift after 4 weeks.

stage.name: MRR pulse + dashboard
stage.intent: Weekly visibility so you stop guessing.

tasks.task: Build a single-screen MRR/churn/activation dashboard
Schedule a weekly 30-minute pulse review
Wire alerts on anomalies

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 4 consecutive weekly pulses are done without skipping.

stage.name: Trigger evaluation

tasks.task: Compare current MRR to trigger contract
Stress-test sustainability (3 months of forward MRR)
Write the quit / keep-job / sunset call

stage.decision-gate: No partial wins. Either trigger met for 3 consecutive months, or restart the loop.

stage.name: Sunset OR scale
stage.intent: Either expand the engine or close cleanly.

tasks.task: If scale: pick the next constraint to attack
If sunset: refund, notify, archive
Either way: capture portable lessons

outputs.output: Scale plan OR sunset comms pack

stage.decision-gate: Closes only on a written committed action.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content 0-4k-mrr-bootstrap-journey --format md, agent: faion get-content 0-4k-mrr-bootstrap-journey --format context, json: faion get-content 0-4k-mrr-bootstrap-journey --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
